current.summary: Content-discovery feature complete (18/18 beads, 2 detector bugs fixed). TUI confirm-bucket rendering ready for brainstorm.

activeWork.description: TUI rendering for confirm-bucket display in content-discovery feature
activeWork.progress: All 18 implementation beads closed. 6 commits on main (+2,248 lines). Integration tests caught 2 real bugs in content-signal detector: (1) confidence boost ordering applied after floor check, now fixed to apply before; (2) filename keywords not included in pre-filter, now included. Only remaining work: syllago-6fubw (TUI confirm-bucket rendering). User selected full brainstorm approach.

git.lastCommit: 233889d docs: regenerate commands.json for new manifest generate flags

recentDecisions: Fixed 2 detector bugs discovered by integration tests
User chose full brainstorm for TUI confirm-bucket feature
Deferred TUI design/implementation to next session
nextSteps: Determine UI placement: install wizard review step, library metadata panel, or both
Note: pre-existing test failures (TestDoctorCheckRegistries_WithConfig, TestGenproviders_*) unrelated to this work

context.notes: Content-discovery is architecturally complete (9 components: detector, sanitizer, vocabulary, scanconfig, confidence, integration tests, CLI flags, signal tracing, audit events). Detector uses keyword-based classification + user-directed directory boosts with configurable confidence floors. Feature integrated into generate_manifest command with --scan-as, --strict, --no-config, --debug-skips, interactive fallback. Ready for TUI design phase.

previousSessions.summary: Executed all 18 implementation tasks for content-based classification (phases 1-9). 6 commits, +2,248 lines. Found and fixed 2 detector bugs via integration tests. Only TUI confirm-bucket rendering remains — ready for brainstorm.
completedWork: All 18 implementation beads from the plan are closed
New files: detector_content_signal.go, sanitize.go, vocabulary.go, scanconfig.go, confidence.go, integration_test.go

Modified: analyzer.go (pipeline wiring), generate_manifest.go (new flags + interactive fallback + confidence tier output), audit.go (signal trace events), types.go (SkipEntry, DebugSkips, NoConfig, Signals, ScanAsPaths), detector_cc.go (path traversal fix), match.go (README exclusion), detector_toplevel.go (quick-win patterns)
Bug 1 fixed: Confidence boost ordering (moved before floor check)
Bug 2 fixed: Filename keywords now included in pre-filter check

previousSessions.summary: Designed content-based classification feature: 3 panel reviews (4 personas × 5 rounds each), design doc with 9 components, implementation plan with 19 tasks, 19 beads created with dependency chains.
completedWork: Implementation plan with 19 tasks across 9 phases
